name: logistics coordinators for freight brokers managing 10-20 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10-20 shipments/week, lack of visibility causes late orders. We provide a supply chain visibility dashboard instead of manual tracking through emails and phone calls.
target_audience: logistics coordinators for freight brokers managing 10-20 shipments/week
problem_solved: Lack of real-time visibility into shipment status and estimated time of arrival.
